text.title: Vercel Deployment Discipline Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Vercel Deployment Discipline.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS on Vercel deploying a multi-tenant dashboard with ISR.
example.trace: env-audit pass → runtime-check finds zero edge violations → ISR review confirms tenant in path → rollback plan complete → go_no_go=go
